input: Describe a day pan Earth weh gravity suddenly reverse fi a few hours. How people an animal dem react?
Mek a character weh was once a hero but don ton a villain due to a tragic misunderstanding.
Mek a character whose shadow come to life an act as dem mischievous counterpart.
Write an email fi follow up pan a job interview yuh did have two weeks ago. Express yuh continued interest inna di position, tank di interviewer fi dem time, an ask fi updates.
Yuh need fi schedule a meeting wid a colleague fi discuss di progress a one project. Write a polite email requesting a suitable time fi di meeting an provide a brief outline.
Compose an email to yuh manager fi apologize fi miss a project deadline. Explain di reason fi di delay, an outline yuh steps fi mek sure it naa go happen again.
Write an email to a vendor who deliver incorrect or damaged products. Politely explain di issue, provide details, an request a refund or replacement.
Write an email to a customer service representative inquiring bout di availability an specifications a one product yuh interested inna purchasing.
Yuh notice seh a incorrect charge pan yuh monthly bill. Write an email to di billing department explaining di issue an asking fi a correction.
Compose an email to a valued customer tank dem fi dem continued business, an inform dem bout a special promotion or offer.
Write an email to a company's customer service department fi address a poor experience yuh did have wid dem service. Explain di prablem an suggest how yuh woulda like it fi resolve.
Compose an email fi request a return or exchange fi a product yuh purchase online. Include yuh order numba an reason fi di return.
Write an email to a fren weh yuh neva talk to fi a while. Kech dem op bout wa a gwaan iina yu laif an aks dem ou dem a du.
Compose an informal email inviting frens to a party yuh a host. Include details bout di date, time, location, an any special activities.
Write an email congratulating a fren or colleague pan a recent achievement. Express yuh happiness fi dem an offer words of encouragement.
Write an email to a close fren or family member shared exciting news. Tell dem di details an how yuh a feel bout it.
Write an email to di admissions office a one university fi ask yuh information bout a specific program. Ask bout di application process, deadlines, etc.
Compose an email to a former professor an ask dem fi write a recommendation letter fi yuh. Provide details bout di position an offer fi provide further information.
Write a formal email to a government official addressing a local issue weh concern yuh. Tell yuh concerns, provide supporting facts, an suggest possible solutions.
Yuh jus staat a new job an yuh waan introduce yuhself to yuh team members. Write a formal email weh introduce yuhself an express yuh excitement bout working together.
Compose an email to a former employer requesting fi use dem as a reference fi a new job application. Politely ask fi dem permission an tank dem fi dem support.
Write a cold email to a potential client weh a introduce yuh company an a offer yuh services. Highlight yuh key strengths an explain how yuh can help dem business.
Compose a marketing email weh announce di launch a one new product. Include details bout di product's features, benefits, an any special promotions or discounts.
Write a follow-up email to a potential client who express interest inna yuh product. Remind dem a di benefits an offer fi ansa any questions.
Compose an email confirming a new subscriber to yuh company's newsletter. Tank dem fi subscribe, tell dem weh fi expect, an include a call to action.
Write a sales email to an existing customer weh a offer related products dem might be interested in based pan previous purchases. Highlight why dem products yah complement dem purchase.
Write an email to yuh professor an ask yuh an extension fi an assignment. Explain yuh situation an provide a reasonable timeline fi wen yuh can complete di work.
Compose an email to yuh classmates dem weh a coordinate a group project. Assign tasks, set deadlines, an suggest a meeting time fi discuss progress.
Write an email to a professor inquiring bout potential research opportunities. Highlight yuh interests an explain why yuh woulda like fi work wid dem.
Write an email to yuh professor an apologize fi miss a class due to unforeseen circumstances. Ask if deh have any material yuh need fi catch up pan.
Compose an email to a former professor or mentor asking fi career advice. Briefly explain yuh current situation an ask fi guidance pan how fi move forward.
Some people believe online learning is more effective dan traditional learning, while others argue classroom learning is still crucial. Discus both views an gi yuh opinion.
Som piipl biliib se envairanmental prablem shuda get solv gluobali, wails adaz tingk se dem shuda get tackl luokali. Discus both views an gi yuh opinion.
Some people believe seh fi achieve work-life balance is more difficult today dan inna di past. To how extent yuh agree or disagree wid dis statement?
Some argue seh animal testing fi medical research is necessary, while others believe it shuda be banned. Discus both views an gi yuh opinion.
Ina nof konchri, yong piipl chogl fi fain wok. Weh a di causes a dis issue, an weh solutions yuh can suggest?
Inna nuff urban areas, homelessness a go op. Weh a di reasons fi dis increase, an weh can be done fi reduce di problem?
Inna nuff parts a di worl, di numba a people weh a read book dem decrease significantly. Weh a di reasons fi dis decline, an weh a di consequences fi society?
Gluobalaizieshan bring nof benifit, bot aalso negitiv impak pah soertn aspek a sasayati. Weh a di causes a globalization, an how it affect di worl?
Inna recent years, remote work don become more common. Discuss di advantages an disadvantages a remote work.
More people a move fram rural areas to cities. Discuss di advantages an disadvantages a dis trend.
Plenty cities a invest inna public transportation systems fi reduce traffic congestion. Discuss di advantages an disadvantages a dis investment.
Inna some countries, gender roles a change, while inna others, traditional roles persist. Yuh agree seh gender roles a change? Weh impact dis a have pan society?
Some people believe seh parents shuda be solely responsible fi raise children, while others tink seh di government shuda play a role. Discus both views an gi yuh opinion.
Some people believe social media have a positive influence pan society, while others tink it have a negative impact. Discus both views an gi yuh opinion.
Globalization a lead to di loss a cultural identity. To how extent yuh agree or disagree? Weh measures dem can tek fi preserve local cultures?
Som piipl biliib se aat a wahn isenshal paat a sasayati, wails ada piipl tingk se a luks. Discus both views an gi yuh opinion.
Describe a futuristic morning routine weh everyting automated an optimized fi maximum productivity. Weh challenges weh yuh neva expect fi come?
Imagine yuh have a superpower weh mek yuh can pause time fi 10 minutes every hour. How yuh incorporate dis inna yuh daily routine?
Invent a creative an unusual to-do list format weh turn daily chores into a game. Weh a di rules dem, an how dem motivate yuh?
Mek a story bout somebody weh a try break a mundane bad habit (like procrastination or excessive snacking) using unconventional or magical methods.
Imagine an office weh every employee represent a different emotion (eg, joy, anger, envy). How dem navigate daily tasks an meetings?
Describe a remote work routine, but instead a work fram yaad, di character a work fram different fantastical locations (like floating islands or enchanted forests).
Write bout an AI personal assistant weh staat fi interpret tasks creatively an tek actions weh both helpful an wildly unpredictable.
Inna a magical office, employees use potions fi boost dem productivity fi different tasks. Weh happen wen somebody tek di wrong potion fi di wrong task?
Describe a chore system weh every household task is turn into a mini-game, complete wid levels, rewards, an unexpected challenges.
Write bout a home weh all di appliances dem can talk. Dem each have distinct personalities an gi advice (or complaints) while yuh do yuh daily chores.
Invent a daily cleaning routine inna a world weh every day bring a different magical obstacle, like enchanted dust or mischievous cleaning tools.
Every time yuh do di laundry, a sock go missing, but instead a disappear, it travel thru time. Write bout di discoveries dem weh dis lead to.
Yuh fitness tracker staat gi yuh personalized, almost psychic advice. How it transform yuh routine, an weh it hidden agenda?
Imagine seh every time yuh work out, yuh get transport to an alternative reality weh yuh physical strength affect di world roun yuh. Describe one workout session.
Write bout somebody weh mek a deal wid a magical being fi stick to dem health goals. Every day dem skip a task, dem face a quirky but inconvenient consequence.
Mek a story weh daily meal prepping turn into a culinary adventure—each ingredient come fram a magical lan an need special handling.
Imagine a yoga class weh tek place inna one enchanted studio weh gravity shift, time bends, an poses tek on magical effects.
Describe a daily commute inna a fantasy city weh full a magical creatures, weh public transportation include enchanted carriages, flying creatures, or portals.
Inna a futuristic city, di subway system a one ever-changing maze. Write bout somebody routine commute thru dis unpredictable system.
Every time yuh tek di bus to work, yuh experience a different version a di same commute inna a parallel universe. Weh patterns or changes yuh staat notice?
Write bout di unusual but brief conversations dem weh tek place pan public transit between passengers weh come fram very different walks a life.
Teleportation a di most common form a transportation, but a glitch cause commuters fi temporarily get stuck between locations. Describe how people handle dis daily inconvenience.
Imagine a futuristic grocery store weh AI-driven robots assist shoppers, but dem have a mind a dem own. How dis affect di shopping experience?
Write bout running errands inna a marketplace weh vendors sell both mundane an magical items, an haggling need not jus money but clever tricks or riddles.
Turn a mundane day a running errands into an epic quest, wid each stop presenting a unique challenge (eg, retrieving rare ingredients, solving puzzles, etc.).
Yuh get a mystery shopping job, but di stores dem weh yuh sen to a anyting but ordinary—each one have a secret weh need fi be uncover.
Inna a high-tech worl weh relaxation scientificly optimized, describe a person's nightly wind-down routine using futuristic tools an methods.
Inna a worl weh dreams can be control by following specific routines, describe a person's preparation fi dem perfect dream.
Write bout somebody weh practice meditation inna di most unusual a places (eg, atop a skyscraper, unda di sea, inna a dense forest) fi center demself afta a long day.
Invent a unique journaling method fi reflect pan di day's events, using prompts weh focus pan small moments a gratitude, creativity, or self-discovery.
A conference is hold between various alien species fi form a universal peace treaty. How dem fi overcome language an cultural barriers?
Write bout a planet weh did engineer by an advanced species but dem did abandon. Weh di new inhabitants dem discover bout it true purpose?
A group a explorers develop technology fi jump between dimensions, but each dimension subtly more dangerous dan di last. Weh keep dem going?
Inna di far future, space is littered wid di debris a long-forgotten spacefaring civilizations. Describe a scavenger's life mongst dem ruins yah.
A mysterious door appear inna di forest weh lead to di fae realm. Weh di first travelers dem find pan di ada side?
Write bout a person weh unknowingly sign a contract wid a powerful sorcerer an now haffi fulfill a near-impossible task.
A prince or princess get curse fi turn inna a beast every night. Dem haffi find a way fi lift di curse before it consume dem.
A person staat fi experience dem nightmares inna real life. Every time dem wake up, anodda piece a di nightmare world follow dem into reality.
Write bout a piece a technology (phone, laptop, etc.) weh get haunted by a malevolent entity. How it manipulate it owna?
A group a fren dem stumble pan a old book weh describe a ritual fi summon a forgotten deity. Dem perform it as a joke—til it work.
A dollmaker mek lifelike dolls, but afta him mysterious disappearance, di dolls dem staat act as if dem alive, each wid sinister intentions.
Describe an expedition to di deepest part a di ocean, weh dem find someting weh dem neva expect—an ancient city weh dem did a guard by unknown creatures.
Inna a desert weh full a dangerous sandstorms an hidden creatures, adventurers compete inna an annual race fi a rare prize.
A band a sky pirates navigate airships thru floating islands an sky cities in search a one legendary treasure hidden inna di clouds.
A detective wake up wid no memory a di last 48 hours, only fi find out seh dem a di prime suspect inna a major crime. How dem fi prove dem innocence?
A hotel mysteriously appear inna different locations roun di worl, but only at night. Once morning come, it vanish. Weh it secret?
Write bout a town weh, one by one, people a vanish widout a trace. Dem weh lef no have no memory a di missing.
A mask stranger keep appearing at various crime scenes but neva seems to be connected to di crime. A uu dem bi, an wa dem nuo?
Imagine an alternative history weh Leonardo da Vinci did complete a working time machine. Weh woulda happen if dem did discover it inna modern times?
Write bout a journalist weh a cover a major historical event weh accidentally alter it outcome wid a single report.
Describe di story a one resistance group during an oppressive regime inna history, an di moral dilemmas dem face fi survive.
Inna di near future, consciousness can be transferred to different bodies. Weh happen wen somebody transfer inna one artificial body an waan go back to dem original form?
Inna a future weh AI kanchruol, di laas disijan weh humans a fi mek a wich memory dem waan preserve fi eternity.
Write a story bout a group a retired superheroes weh come out a retirement fi one last mission.
Describe di adventures a one time traveler weh accidentally get stuck inna a parallel universe weh historical events tek a drastically different turn.
Imagine a kingdom weh emotions control di weather. Describe a day inna di life a one citizen weh live deh.
Write a dialogue between a detective an a criminal mastermind who are secretly childhood frens.
output:
Detective: How was your day?
Criminal mastermind: Alright, I got a call from the police station, they want to know if you were there on that day
Detective: I wasn't. I was at home
Criminal mastermind: So, it was you that killed him?
Detective: No, I didn't kill him
Criminal mastermind: What did you do with him?
Detective: I didn't do anything with him
Criminal mastermind: Why did you kill him?
Detective: I didn't kill him
Criminal mastermind: You were at the station, so you know who did. Tell them you didn't do anything
Detective: No, I don't know who did it. I don't know who killed him. I just don't know
Criminal mastermind: Tell them you were at home that day
Detective: No, I was at home that day. I wasn't there
Criminal mastermind: So, what did you do with him?
Detective: I didn't do anything with him
Criminal mastermind: So, who did you kill him for?
Detective: I didn't kill him
Criminal mastermind: Tell them you didn't do anything
Detective: No, I don't know who killed him. I just don't know
Criminal mastermind: Tell them you were at home that day
Detective: No, I was at home that day. I wasn't there
Criminal mastermind: So, who did you kill him for?
Detective: I didn't kill him
Criminal mastermind: Tell them you didn't do anything
Detective: No, I don't know who killed him. I just don't know
Criminal mastermind: Tell them you were at home that day
Detective: No, I was at home that day. I wasn't there
Criminal mastermind: So, who did you kill him for?
Detective: I didn't kill him
Criminal mastermind: Tell them you didn't do anything
Detective: No, I don't know who killed him. I just don't know
Criminal mastermind: Tell them you were at home that day
Detective: No, I was at home that day. I wasn't there
Criminal mastermind: So, who did you kill him for?
Detective: I didn't kill him
Criminal mastermind: Tell them

input: Craft a conversation between an AI an it creator, weh di AI question di purpose a it existence.
Write a dialogue between two courtiers conspiring fi overthrow a beloved monarch, but wid a twist dat one a dem have a hidden agenda.
output: Sir: Hey, I hear you are planning to take over the country. I know you are, but I have a twist for you. The plan is to have a coup. But the one who is planning to do it, has a hidden agenda. Please tell me what is going on? Sir: Excuse me, are you sure you are not planning to do it? Sir: Do you know what I have to do? Sir: I have to make sure that the king is dead, before I can take over the country. I have to do it before the king's body is found. Sir: I understand, but I have to make sure that the king's body is found. Sir: I know. I know. Sir: But you are not going to kill the king, are you? Sir: No, I am not. Sir: Ok. But you have to make sure that the king is dead. Sir: Yes, I know. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: I have to make sure that the king's body is found. Sir: Yes, I know. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok. Sir: Ok.

input: Diskraib wah wol we sivilaizieshan lib pah flotin ailan ina di skai, ah rizuos get chranzpuot chuu wah netwok a giant baluun.
Imagine a sprawling underground city powered by bioluminescent plants. Weh challenges di people dem weh live deh face?
Create a world weh di only source a water is a mystical oasis weh move every month, leading to constant migration a all inhabitants.
Describe a post-apocalyptic world weh rebuild itself into a utopia, but wid underlying secrets weh threaten its peace.
Write a poem weh each season is personified an dem engage inna a conversation bout di cycle a life.
Mek a series a haikus weh each represent a fragmented memory a a forgotten love.
Compose a poem weh tek di reader chruu a series a surreal dreamscapes, blending reality an imagination.
Write a poem weh capture di rhythm an sounds a one bustling city as if it was a symphony.
Wat if all di colors dem inna di worl staat disappear one by one? Diskraib wa apn wen a onggl wan kala lef.
Wat if people staat aging backwards, getting younger as dem live longer? How dis woulda affect dem relationships an di concept a time?
